posts.title: Why Leadership Is a Behavior, Not a Title: Beating Burnout as a Woman Manager
posts.excerpt: Elizabeth Taylor reveals why women managers aged 35-45 are the most burned-out group and shares her framework for leading with confidence while maintaining boundaries. Plus, discover why credit confidence is actually a leadership skill.

posts.title: Why Self-Care Is Mandatory for Moms: A Doctor's Guide to Holistic Motherhood
posts.excerpt: Dr. Laura Brayton reveals why self-care isn't selfish—it's mandatory for every mother. Discover how chiropractic care transforms pregnancy outcomes, why preconception detox matters, and how to regulate your nervous system for better leadership.

posts.title: The Leadership Skills You Learn from Parenting That Will Transform Your Career
posts.excerpt: What if parenting isn't just about raising kids, but about developing the most crucial leadership skills for your career? Kristina Campos reveals how the 'long game' mindset of parenting translates into powerful professional leadership strategies.

posts.title: How to Build Your Own Table When There's No Seat for You
posts.excerpt: In this premiere episode, Neetu Sadhwani shares her journey from comfort zone to purpose-driven entrepreneur. Get ready for real talk on burnout, building your own opportunities, and why waiting for permission is overrated.

posts.title: Nikki Bostwick on Intuitive Leadership and Conscious Motherhood
posts.excerpt: Wellness visionary Nikki Bostwick shares how she built The Fullest while raising children, revealing the messy truth about balancing entrepreneurship and motherhood. This conversation is packed with honest insights about trusting your intuition in leadership and doing life your own way.

posts.title: Building Stronger Relationships: Expert Tips on Emotional Wellness & Boundaries
posts.excerpt: Licensed therapist Vanessa Morgan shares powerful insights on emotional well-being, healthy communication, and setting boundaries that transform relationships. This conversation offers practical tools for managing your emotional world with grace and intention.

posts.title: From CrossFit Champion to Business Boss: Kelly Abney's Blueprint for Success
posts.excerpt: CrossFit Games champion Kelly Abney reveals the unseen hustle behind her athletic achievements and business success. Discover how she owns her strength, balances competition with entrepreneurship, and what it really takes to break barriers as a woman in fitness.

posts.title: From Hollywood to Clean Beauty: Laura Linsenmeyer's Journey to Purpose-Driven Leadership
posts.excerpt: Former Hollywood makeup artist Laura Linsenmeyer reveals how she transformed her passion for clean beauty into a thriving conscious brand. This conversation explores the intersection of motherhood, mission, and entrepreneurial courage.

posts.title: From Grief to Grit: How One Woman Rebuilt Her Life and Business After Loss
posts.excerpt: Join Aimee and longtime friend Leslie Christen for an honest conversation about turning life's deepest challenges into unshakeable strength. From widowhood to entrepreneurship, Leslie shares how she rebuilt her world while managing the invisible labor that holds everything together.

posts.title: From Music Classes to Farm School: Building Community-Centered Businesses
posts.excerpt: Educator and entrepreneur Brooke Briggs shares how she built two mission-driven businesses that nurture children and strengthen communities. Her journey from music classes to farm-based learning offers a blueprint for creating meaningful work alongside motherhood.

posts.title: From Filmmaker to Wellness Pioneer: Sybil Steele's Journey of Creative Reinvention
posts.excerpt: Creative entrepreneur Sybil Steele shares her powerful journey from filmmaker to wellness pioneer, revealing how motherhood and intuition guided her transformation. Discover how she built multiple businesses while staying true to her authentic self and purpose.

posts.title: The Truth About Leading While Mothering: My Breakdown to Breakthrough Story
posts.excerpt: In her first solo episode, Aimee Rickabus gets vulnerable about juggling six kids, running a nine-figure company, and why the invisible work women do every day is actually leadership. This is the real story behind The Manage Her book and movement.

posts.title: How a 26-Year-Old Single Mom Built Her Tech Career While Raising Two Kids
posts.excerpt: Hannah White proves that age and circumstances don't define your potential. At just 26, this single mom is crushing it in tech while raising two boys and discovering her own power along the way.

posts.title: How to Balance Creative Dreams with Motherhood: Lessons from Musician Stacy Clark
posts.excerpt: Musician Stacy Clark reveals how she's mastered the art of juggling creative pursuits, managing her kids' acting careers, and advocating for music education. Her story proves you don't have to choose between being a devoted mother and pursuing your passions.

posts.title: How a Functional Medicine Doctor Manages Family Life While Healing the Unhealable
posts.excerpt: Discover how Dr. Sunny Raleigh treats the patients no one else can heal while managing her clinic from Idaho and raising three teenage boys. This episode reveals the gut-brain connection secrets and practical strategies for leading both at home and at work.

posts.title: From Dreams to Reality: How to Set Bold Goals That Transform Your Life
posts.excerpt: Discover how entrepreneur and mother Wendee Close turned her passion for goal-setting into a thriving business. Learn practical strategies for balancing leadership, family, and purpose while creating the life you truly want.

posts.title: From Burnout to Balance: How One Solo Mom Rebuilt Her Confidence and Identity
posts.excerpt: Solo mom Jessica Renee shares her raw journey from losing herself in early motherhood to intentionally rebuilding her confidence and identity. This conversation will inspire any woman wondering if it's too late to start again.

posts.title: How to Build Multiple Businesses While Homeschooling and Leading with Heart
posts.excerpt: Serial entrepreneur and homeschooling mom Heather Gerber shares how she built Guiding Our Days while running her tanning business, proving you don't have to choose between family, business, and community impact. This conversation will inspire any woman ready to create a life that fits her values and vision.

posts.title: How Entrepreneurship Can Give You Your Power Back: A Mother's Journey
posts.excerpt: Discover how entrepreneur and mother Kathleen Reed reclaimed her power through business ownership while applying The Manage Her principles to transform her family life. A conversation about real leadership, invisible labor, and finding purpose beyond titles.

posts.title: From Corporate Law to Fighting Human Trafficking: One Woman's Bold Career Pivot
posts.excerpt: Human rights attorney Leigh Dundas shares her extraordinary journey from high-stakes corporate litigation to leading dangerous undercover missions against child trafficking. Her story will redefine what you think courage and leadership really look like.

posts.title: How Creative Entrepreneurs Can Overcome Invisible Labor and Patriarchal Barriers
posts.excerpt: Creative entrepreneur Lindsay Buwalda shares her journey of building a design empire while navigating the invisible labor women carry daily. Discover how she overcame being underestimated and learned to leverage technology to balance creativity, leadership, and motherhood.

posts.title: How Paige Johnson Built a Pilates Empire While Managing Motherhood
posts.excerpt: Paige Johnson reveals the invisible work behind building a successful Pilates studio while raising a daughter. She shares how movement became her form of leadership and the tech tools that keep her grounded in both business and life.

posts.title: Why Power Skills Are the Future of Leadership (And How to Build Them Fast)
posts.excerpt: What if leadership isn't just about strategy and hustle, but about empathy, confidence, and connection? Discover how AI-powered microlearning is revolutionizing the way we build essential power skills in just 5-minute bursts.

posts.title: From Homeschooling Mom to Executive Coach: Building Leaders at Home and Work
posts.excerpt: Executive coach and single mom Amanda Jaggard shares how she transformed from homeschooling mother to successful business leader while raising her sons on commitments instead of rules. Her approach to building culture at home offers powerful lessons for workplace leadership.

posts.title: How Faith and Financial Freedom Create Purpose-Driven Leadership Success
posts.excerpt: Spring Eatmon retired at 28 to walk in purpose over paycheck, building generational wealth through faith-aligned business. Her story proves that true financial freedom begins with knowing your worth and living in alignment with your calling.

posts.title: How to Reinvent Your Career: From Corporate Success to Island Life
posts.excerpt: Discover how one woman made the bold decision to leave her high-fashion career behind for a completely different life in Kauai. This episode explores the courage it takes to reinvent yourself and the unexpected rewards that come with following your intuition.

posts.title: From High School Coach to Tech CEO: The Accidental Entrepreneur's Journey
posts.excerpt: What if your leadership story didn't start in a boardroom, but on a high school gym floor? Alyssa Nolte shares how she accidentally built a tech company while coaching teenagers and why starting before you're ready might be exactly what you need.

posts.title: Why Self-Management Is the Secret to Great Leadership (And Motherhood)
posts.excerpt: Former corporate executive Lynda Harvey reveals why the best leaders start by managing themselves first. From boardroom to living room, discover how self-awareness and emotional intelligence transform your leadership style.

posts.title: Why Leadership Is a Behavior, Not a Title: Elizabeth Taylor's Guide to Burnout-Proof Management
posts.excerpt: Discover why women managers aged 35-45 are the most burned-out group in corporate America and learn actionable strategies to lead with confidence while protecting your energy. Elizabeth Taylor reveals how credit confidence becomes a leadership superpower.

posts.title: Why Men Need to Step Up Beyond Providing: Marriage Mental Load Solutions
posts.excerpt: The first male guest on The Manage Her reveals why traditional masculine roles fall short and how men can truly share the mental load. This groundbreaking conversation offers practical tools for creating real partnership in marriage.

posts.title: How to Raise Resilient, Purpose-Driven Kids in an Uncertain World
posts.excerpt: What if the secret to raising resilient children isn't about protecting them from discomfort, but teaching them to find meaning in it? Author and thought leader Pam Roy shares how to parent with purpose and prepare kids for a meaningful future.

posts.title: Career Security vs Job Security: How to Reinvent Your Leadership at Any Age
posts.excerpt: What if everything you've been told about career success is wrong? Lyndsay Dowd reveals why career security trumps job security every time and shares her blueprint for reinventing yourself as a leader at any age. Get ready to transform not just your career, but your entire approach to leadership.

posts.title: Why Your Money Story Controls Your Financial Future (And How to Rewrite It)
posts.excerpt: Your relationship with money was shaped before you could even read—and it might be sabotaging your financial future. Discover how to identify and rewrite the money story that's been running your life.

posts.title: From Culinary School to Restaurant Empire: How One Chef Rebuilt After Divorce
posts.excerpt: Discover how chef Lindsay Smith turned her 40th birthday revelation into a complete life rebuild, buying out her husband during COVID and transforming from restaurant operator to empowered business owner while creating community through food.

posts.title: Why Toxic Resilience Is Keeping Women Stuck (And What to Do Instead)
posts.excerpt: What if the resilience you've been praised for is actually keeping you stuck? Dr. Katie Pritchett reveals why 'pushing through' isn't strength—and how women can lead the AI revolution by automating their invisible labor.

posts.title: How One Mom's Vaccine Injury Led to Global Child Advocacy: Eden Marie James
posts.excerpt: When Eden Marie James' child suffered a vaccine injury, she didn't stay silent—she became a force for change. From founding the MAHA Mom Coalition to fighting child trafficking globally, her story proves the unstoppable power of mother-led advocacy.

posts.title: How Bipolar Disorder Became Her Greatest Business Asset: Gabrielle Scout Maio
posts.excerpt: Gabrielle Scout Maio turned her bipolar disorder diagnosis into her greatest business superpower, building Scouts Agency from zero to quitting her job in just three months. Her story proves that what makes you different might just be what makes you unstoppable.

posts.title: How One Mom with Brain Injury Built a 30K-Member Movement to Fight for Kids
posts.excerpt: After a devastating brain injury left her unable to read or walk across a room, Amy Bohn discovered 50,000 California children were being denied education due to medical exemption laws. What she did next will inspire every parent who's ever felt powerless against the system.

posts.title: The 3-Step Framework to Transform Your Family's Health (Without Overwhelm)
posts.excerpt: Functional medicine expert Julie E reveals her revolutionary three-step system that helped her raise a son who never missed school due to illness. Learn how to stop outsourcing your family's health and start managing it like the leader you are.

posts.title: Why Women Must Change Their Money Mindset to Build Real Wealth
posts.excerpt: Financial educator Melissa Northway reveals why the majority of elderly poor are women and shares the wealth-building strategies billionaires use. Learn how to become your own bank and turn money into true freedom.

posts.title: The Science of Cellular Energy: How to Reset Your Mitochondria for Peak Performance
posts.excerpt: What if the secret to boundless energy isn't another supplement, but optimizing your cells? Discover how to reset your mitochondria for peak performance, mental clarity, and longevity through science-backed strategies that busy women leaders can actually implement.

posts.title: Why Pleasure Isn't Selfish: A Sexologist's Guide to Reclaiming Intimacy
posts.excerpt: Sexologist Dr. Holly Wood joins Aimee for a bold conversation about dismantling shame, reclaiming desire, and why pleasure is actually self-care. This is the conversation every woman needs to hear.

posts.title: The Science Behind Love & Oneness: How Conscious Leadership Creates Wealth
posts.excerpt: What if the universal truths of science and spirituality could revolutionize your business? Dave Lundgren reveals how Love and Oneness, backed by quantum physics, unlock breakthrough success through conscious leadership and energy balance.

posts.title: Why Human Connection is Your Secret Weapon Against AI (with Scott MacGregor)
posts.excerpt: What if the most powerful business strategy isn't a strategy at all? Scott MacGregor reveals why intentional relationship building is the one skill AI will never replace, and how his "extra inch" philosophy can transform your connections.

posts.title: From Classroom Shock to State Senate: One Mom's Political Awakening
posts.excerpt: When COVID lockdowns revealed what was really happening in her kids' classrooms, mom Kristina Irwin didn't just get mad—she decided to run for state senate. Her journey from grassroots write-in candidate to fighting for parental rights will inspire any parent who feels unheard.

posts.title: The Feminine Shift: Why Women Are Burning Out and How to Return to Your Nature
posts.excerpt: What if your burnout is actually your body telling you you're living out of alignment with your feminine nature? Chelsea Ann O'Brien shares why a massive shift is coming in 2027 and how women can heal from operating like men in a masculine world.

posts.title: Why the Tax Code Was Actually Written to Help Women Entrepreneurs Win
posts.excerpt: Tax strategist Barbara Schreihans reveals why only 12 pages of the 7,000-page tax code tell you what to pay, and how women entrepreneurs can use the remaining pages to their advantage. This conversation will completely transform how you think about taxes and money.

posts.title: A 50-Year Media Veteran Reveals What They Never Say On Air
posts.excerpt: Steve Edwards spent 50 years inside the media machine and is finally pulling back the curtain. From the devastating impact of social media on young girls to why gratitude became his survival tool, this conversation will change how you see the media landscape forever.

posts.title: From Childhood Parades to Live Events Empire: Building Community While Raising Kids
posts.excerpt: Christina Wooldridge almost kept her trivia company a secret—now it's building real community across San Diego. Discover how she turned a 'silly' business idea into her superpower while raising two kids.

posts.title: From Corporate Burnout to Financial Freedom: A Working Mom's Reinvention
posts.excerpt: When pregnancy loss, divorce, and corporate burnout derailed her 10-year plan, Tiana Reeves discovered that reinvention isn't about starting over—it's about starting wiser. Her journey from financial fear to empowerment will reshape how you think about money, marriage, and motherhood.

posts.title: Why Modern Women Are Out of Balance (And How to Return to Your Nature)
posts.excerpt: Modern women are burning out at unprecedented rates, and Chelsea Ann O'Brien believes it's because we're living out of alignment with our feminine nature. Discover why returning to your authentic self could be the key to healing burnout and disconnection.

posts.title: From Frustrated Mom to Political Candidate: Why This Mother Is Running for Office
posts.excerpt: When COVID lockdowns revealed what was really happening in her kids' classrooms, this mom didn't just complain—she decided to run for California State Senate. Kristina Irwin shares her journey from frustrated parent to political candidate.

posts.title: How One Mom Built Financial Independence After Divorce: The Corporate Mom Story
posts.excerpt: From pregnancy loss and divorce to PMP-certified powerhouse, Tiana Reeves shares her blueprint for working mom reinvention. Discover why marriage is like a corporate merger and how to teach your kids financial literacy early.

posts.title: Why Your Unpaid Motherhood Labor is Worth $10 Trillion (And How to Claim It)
posts.excerpt: The invisible workload of motherhood is worth over $10 trillion annually—and no one pays for it. Dr. Danielle Dowling reveals why naming this labor as work isn't betrayal, it's dignity, and gives you the framework to stop internalizing overwhelm as personal failure.

posts.title: How a Mom's 'Silly' Trivia Business Became a Community-Building Empire
posts.excerpt: Discover how Christina Wooldridge transformed her 'silly' trivia idea into a thriving live events company that builds real community. If you're wondering whether your unconventional business idea is worth pursuing, this conversation will give you the permission you need to start.

posts.title: Why Writing Your Book Alone Is the Biggest Mistake You'll Make
posts.guestName: Dr. Shana Hartman and Dr. Cindy Urbanski
posts.excerpt: What if the secret to finally writing your book isn't discipline or perfect timing, but community and permission to be messy? The book midwives who helped birth The Manage Her book reveal why women write differently—and how to honor your unique process.

posts.title: Why 6,988 Pages of Tax Code Are Actually Written to Help You Pay Less
posts.excerpt: Most entrepreneurs overpay taxes because they don't understand that the tax code was written FOR them, not against them. Barbara Schreihans reveals why only 12 pages tell you what to pay while 6,988 pages show you how to pay less.

posts.title: From Culinary School to CEO: Chef Lindsay Smith's 19-Year Business Journey
posts.excerpt: Chef Lindsay Smith reveals how she navigated divorce, rebuilt her restaurant during COVID, and transformed from stressed operator to empowered owner. Her story proves that your biggest challenges can become your greatest breakthroughs.

posts.title: How One Mother Turned Vaccine Injury Into a Movement for Medical Freedom
posts.excerpt: When Eden Marie James's child suffered a vaccine injury, she didn't stay silent—she became a warrior. Her story reveals how mothers can turn their deepest pain into powerful advocacy that changes lives.

posts.title: How Burnout Became the Blueprint for a $Million Ethical Fashion Empire
posts.excerpt: From NYC fashion house burnout to building an ethical fashion empire with 3,000+ retailers—Kathryn Letson's journey proves you can create massive impact without sacrificing your wellbeing. Her story will reshape how you think about success, sustainability, and building a business that actually fits your life.

posts.title: From Corporate Careers to Restroom Revolution: The UNICORN Story
posts.excerpt: Two cousins spotted a gap most of us overlook in restroom equity and built a movement around it. Discover how Denielle and Thyme transformed an invisible problem into a business serving Fortune 500 companies nationwide.

posts.title: Why Power Skills Beat Hard Skills: The Future of Leadership Learning
posts.excerpt: What if the key to leadership isn't just strategy and hustle — but empathy, confidence, and connection? Discover how AI-powered microlearning is revolutionizing the way we build essential power skills in just 5-minute learning bursts.
